title: DatedFlight
description: DatedFlight schema from On-Demand Flight Status

carrierCode.description: 2 to 3-character IATA code of the carrier. e.g. 6X

flightNumber.description: 1 to 4-digit number of the flight e.g. 4537

operationalSuffix.description: 1-letter operational suffix of the flight e.g. A

flightPoints.description:
the flight points of the flight.
At least one departure, one arrival

iataCode.description: 3-letter IATA code of the airport. e.g. CDG

departure.description: the departure information if the flightPoint is a departure for the flight

arrival.description: the arrival information if the flightPoint is an arrival for the flight

segments.description:
the list of segments of the datedFlight
- definition of segment: the commercial unit corresponding to the passenger journey traveling between two points with the same flight (same flight designator)

boardPointIataCode.description: 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport. e.g. CDG

offPointIataCode.description: 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport. e.g. AMS

scheduledSegmentDuration.description: duration of the segment following standard [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations)

legs.description:
the list of legs of the datedFlight.
- definition of leg: operation of the aircraft between a departure station and the next arrival station (between take off and landing)

boardPointIataCode.description: 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport. e.g. LHR

offPointIataCode.description: 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport. e.g. BKK

scheduledLegDuration.description: duration of the leg following standard [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations)
